name: Clearwire Corporation
description: Clearwire Corporation was a provider of wireless broadband services, operating a next-generation 4G mobile broadband network. Founded in 2003 by Craig McCaw, the company utilized WiMAX and later LTE technologies to deliver high-speed internet access to residential and business customers across the United States. Clearwire was acquired by Sprint Nextel Corporation in 2013, which subsequently integrated Clearwire's extensive spectrum holdings into its own network infrastructure.
